title: Untrusted Assets, Save Parsing, Paths, Privacy, and Local Security · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved game trace contains one plausible state, timing, input, vector, rendering, collision, ownership, audio, accessibility, packaging, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded local-data and privacy policy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Identify protected player data and availability, untrusted files and paths, package supply chain, local attackers, and realistic consequences.
Constrain asset, settings, replay, and score paths to approved roots and reject traversal, symlink, type, and size violations.
Use bounded validated data formats, reject unsafe object loading, write atomically, and recover without hiding corruption.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Inspect the failure record · Debug Threat Model
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Asteroids team handles case 9364 during a keyboard-only community arcade night. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound asset and save paths, sizes, parsing, integrity purpose, privacy, telemetry consent, and untrusted-content behavior; test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases; then replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Identify protected player data and availability, untrusted files and paths, package supply chain, local attackers, and realistic consequences.

Inspect the Threat Model trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Privacy Telemetry
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: asteroids-privacy-telemetry-gpipd" that uses case 8525 to bound asset and save paths, sizes, parsing, integrity purpose, privacy, telemetry consent, and untrusted-content behavior. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not claim native pygame-ce, SDL, window, controller, mixer, filesystem, package, GPU, installer, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, released pygame-ce 2.5.7, fixed and headless SDL fixtures, real devices, licensed assets, accessibility playtests, profiling, clean installations, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Privacy Telemetry.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Privacy Telemetry into observable performance evidence. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Privacy Telemetry, keep Privacy Telemetry connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-privacy-telemetry-gpipd
# Competency: asteroids-privacy-telemetry.
# Case 8525: a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling.
# Operating constraint: preserve explicit pixels, seconds, radians or degrees, frames, entity counts, collision units, and budgets.
# Changed case: run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save.
def evidence_asteroids_privacy_telemetry_gpipd(untrusted_paths: int = 6, rejected_paths: int = 6, save_size: int = 4096, save_limit: int = 65536, remote_content: bool = False, telemetry_opt_in: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_gpipd = "gpipd-dpipg-8525"
    assert evidence_variant_gpipd
    evidence_axes_gpipd = (
        "playergpipd",
        "seed8525",
        "inputdpipg",
        "framegpipd8525",
        "state8525gpipd",
        "playtestdpipg8525",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_gpipd)) == 6
    if untrusted_paths < 0 or rejected_paths < 0:
        return False, rejected_paths, "security-domain"
    if rejected_paths != untrusted_paths:
        return False, rejected_paths, "path-admission"
    if save_size < 0 or save_size > save_limit:
        return False, save_size, "save-budget"
    if remote_content or not telemetry_opt_in:
        return False, save_size, "external-data"
    assert save_size <= save_limit
    return True, rejected_paths, "bounded-local-data"
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Privacy Telemetry structural check is only one gate. bounded local-data and privacy policy must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
